content: Zidio-ProjectLoop has solved our theme aggregation bottleneck. We can easily associate requests to themes.
The main dashboard takes more than 5 seconds to load when switching between views. This is slowing down our daily standups.
API response times for the feedback list endpoint are very high. Can we look into optimizing database queries?
CSV exports are hitting timeout errors when downloading datasets larger than 10,000 rows. We need this for weekly reporting.
Overall page transitions feel a bit sluggish on low-end laptops. Let's optimize client-side bundle size.
Database sync is occasionally locking up the UI during imports. Can we run imports asynchronously in the background?
Querying historical data is extremely slow. We need better indexes on the createdAt and status fields.
The chart rendering on the analytics tab lags when there are too many data points. Let's add debouncing or aggregate data.
Extremely fast and snappy app! The recent performance updates really made a huge difference.
Search queries take too long to resolve when using multiple filter tags concurrently.
Exporting large PDF reports is slow and sometimes fails completely without showing any error message.
Please add dark mode. The bright white layout is hurting my eyes during late-night reviews.
The dark mode implementation is inconsistent. Some borders and input placeholders remain bright white.
I absolutely love the dark theme! It looks super sleek and premium. Great work on the design.
Login and register screens are missing dark mode support. They are blindingly bright compared to the main dashboard.
High-contrast accessibility theme requested for users with low vision. The current light mode gray-on-white text is hard to read.
Some charts in dark mode have poor color contrast. The dark blue text on a black background is unreadable.
Auto-detect system theme setting for light/dark mode is not working on mobile Safari.
The theme toggle button should be easier to find. Maybe place it in the main sidebar instead of nested in settings.
Custom color theme options would be amazing. Let us set primary brand colors for our workspace.
Toggle dark mode instantly causes a brief white flash during layout repaint. Please fix the CSS variables loading order.
The sidebar navigation is completely broken on iPhone 13. I cannot open the menu at all in portrait mode.
Tables do not scroll horizontally on mobile screens. The content is clipped and cut off.
Touch targets for edit and delete buttons are too small on mobile. I keep clicking the wrong row.
Having trouble using the CSV import interface on my iPad. Drag and drop doesn't work well on tablet browsers.
The mobile app is really intuitive. Love being able to check customer requests on the go.
Filter dropdown menus open off-screen on smaller mobile viewports. Needs auto-repositioning logic.
The loading animation on mobile takes up the whole screen and blocks back navigation.
Please optimize the layout for smaller phone screens. The workspace list overlaps with the header text.
Push notifications on iOS are delayed by several minutes. Makes real-time collaboration difficult.
Great responsiveness on the main dashboard, but the settings panel is still difficult to navigate on mobile.
Partial search queries are not returning any results. If I search 'dash', it should find 'dashboard'.
We need the ability to save search filter combinations. Selecting the same status and channel filters every morning is tedious.
The search bar should highlight matching text inside the feedback content column.
Clear filters action is missing a shortcut key. Let us press Escape to clear search and filters.
Filter count indicator would be helpful. Show how many items are in 'Under Review' next to the option.
Searching by customer label is case-sensitive, which makes it hard to find entries. It should be case-insensitive.
Cannot search for feedback entries that have empty customer labels. Please add a 'No Label' filter option.
The channel filter dropdown is missing an option for CSV imports. It's listed in the schema but not in the UI.
Search is incredibly fast now! Finding specific tickets takes less than a second.
Search results are reset whenever I edit a feedback entry. I lose my place in the list.
I am getting way too many email notifications. Please let us customize notification frequency or opt-out completely.
Slack integration is highly requested. We want feedback alerts streamed directly into our product channels.
Mentioning teammates using @name does not send them any alert. Is this feature implemented yet?
In-app notifications don't mark themselves as read automatically when I click on them. I have to click 'Mark all as read'.
Weekly digest emails are empty if no new feedback was submitted. It shouldn't send an empty email.
Desktop notifications ask for permission every single time the tab is reloaded on Chrome.
The notification bell icon should show a badge with the exact number of unread alerts instead of just a dot.
We need webhook support for feedback events so we can trigger custom internal Slack notifications.
Notifications for status changes (e.g. Under Review -> Resolved) are not being sent to the original creator.
Can we disable email alerts for views we aren't assigned to? Our inbox is overflowing.
The CSV import tool returns validation errors but doesn't tell us which column failed. The error message is too generic.
CSV template has headers that mismatch what the API validation expects. Took me an hour to figure out the casing.
Need Zendesk integration. Manually copying customer tickets into LOOP is a waste of time.
Intercom integration request. We want to sync conversations marked with tag 'feedback' directly to LOOP.
Importing CSV with UTF-8 characters breaks the content parsing. Emojis and accented letters become corrupt.
Can we export feedback in JSON format instead of just CSV? We want to plug it into our custom analytics pipeline.
CSV import doesn't let us map columns dynamically. We have to rename our spreadsheet fields to match your format exactly.
Demo data import is great for testing features quickly! Very helpful onboarding tool.
We need an export API endpoint so we can fetch all resolved feedbacks automatically every night.
The CSV import summary should display how many duplicates were ignored during ingestion.
AI sentiment classification is tag-based? We need a numerical sentiment score to track trends over time.
Auto-clustering feedbacks by topic would be an amazing feature. We have thousands of entries to organize.
The sentiment analysis sometimes classifies bug reports as negative when they are just factual statements.
We need a dashboard view showing sentiment trends per channel (e.g. Twitter vs Support Ticket).
The AI summary feature is super helpful. Saves us hours of reading through long support tickets.
Can we train the AI classifier on our custom taxonomy? 'Billing' vs 'Pricing' is a subtle difference for a general model.
Analytics graphs are missing a filter for Customer Label. We only want to see sentiment for Enterprise users.
The AI tag suggestions are occasionally irrelevant. There should be a way to reject or override them in the UI.
AI processing takes a long time to trigger. It sits in 'Pending' for up to 5 minutes after CSV upload.
Is there an AI analytics endpoint we can query to get overall monthly sentiment trends?
We need to assign feedback items to specific team members. Right now anyone can edit anything.
Can we add internal comments to feedback items? We want to discuss requests before changing their status.
Activity log is missing. I want to see who changed a feedback status from Under Review to Closed.
Jira sync request. When we set a feedback status to IN_PROGRESS, it should create a ticket in Jira automatically.
Users should be able to upvote existing feedbacks so we can see which requests are most popular.
Need to link multiple feedbacks together. Customers often request the same thing in slightly different ways.
Beautiful collaboration features. The real-time updates are working perfectly.
Is there a way to lock a feedback item so others can't edit it while I am writing a response?
We need custom roles. Analysts should only be allowed to tag feedback, not delete them.
Merging duplicate feedbacks should combine their theme assignments and customer labels automatically.
Support for SAML SSO is a hard requirement for our security review. We cannot adopt LOOP without it.
The login session expires too quickly. I have to log back in every hour, which is disruptive.
Multi-factor authentication (MFA) setup is missing. Our team security guidelines require this for all tools.
Password reset emails are getting flagged as spam by Google Workspace. Please check your domain SPF/DKIM records.
The registration page keeps throwing an error when I try to sign up with a valid email. The error message doesn't help.
Is there an IP whitelist feature for workspace access control? We want to restrict logins to our office VPN.
Can we restrict invite links to specific domains (e.g. only allow @company.com emails to join)?
Session hijack protection or concurrent session limits would be great additions for security compliance.
Password requirements are too loose. We should enforce symbol, number, and uppercase checks.
SSO login flows redirect back to the home page instead of the path I originally bookmarked.
The text editor inside the feedback detail screen keeps stripping out empty lines and formatting.
Clicking 'Save Changes' on edit form sometimes does nothing. No loading spinner, no error banner, just freezes.
The customer label is capped at 100 characters, but the UI doesn't stop us from typing more, causing database errors on submit.
Status dropdown sometimes resets to 'Submitted' after saving inline edits. Database updates but UI is wrong.
The delete confirmation modal closes when clicking outside the dialog box. This is dangerous and can lead to accidental deletion.
Borders inside the feedback table are misaligned in dark mode. Looks like a CSS margin issue.
The app crashed completely when I pasted a 10,000 character feedback. It should warn us of the limit instead.
Hover tooltip on table content column is delayed by several seconds. Can we make it display instantly?
Clicking row to view details doesn't open in a new tab when using Ctrl+Click or middle click.
Theme colors are not updating in real-time when custom themes are added. I have to force reload the page.
This tool has completely transformed how we handle client requests. Super clean UI and dead simple workflows.
The speed of the application is impressive. Snappiest SaaS feedback tool I've tested so far.
Customer labels and channels are perfect for organizing our feedback database. Very intuitive.
Beautiful design aesthetics. The subtle gradients and dark theme are premium and look amazing.
We imported 500 tickets in under 10 seconds. Ingestion performance is stellar.
So simple to onboard our support agents. Literally took them 5 minutes to learn how to log feedback.
Love the custom validation errors on CSV upload. Makes correcting formatting errors extremely easy.
Great support docs. Everything was documented perfectly, making setup a breeze.
Best feedback client I have used. Clean, simple, fast, and does exactly what it says on the box.
